name: chain_ph_launch_optimo_effortless_media_opt
method: [PH LAUNCH] optimo: effortless media optimizer for the web

stages.task: Extract PH launch data: upvote count, top comments, maker profile, pricing tiers, tech stack, target audience signals
Score: (1) dev/web tool? (2) affiliate program exists? (3) maker is solo founder without CTO — EAS fit? (4) comparison angle available vs incumbent tools?
Run engagement_bait_converter.py: generate 3 tweets + 1 thread on web media optimization pain points, tool comparison angles (Optimo vs Cloudinary vs manual ImageMagick), developer productivity hooks
If EAS-qualified maker: add to cold outreach queue with pitch angle (media optimization service / app build). If affiliate program found: embed links in all comparison content.
